title: Hydron - Clear Water
description: A simple texture pack which makes water clearer
body:
**Tired of murky water and terrible underwater visibility?** Hydron makes water noticeably clearer — while preserving Minecraft’s vanilla look and feel. ---

***
***

--- ## Features - Clearer underwater visibility - Reduced blue tint and fog for cleaner oceans, rivers, and caves - Vanilla-consistent visuals with no FullBright or night-vision behavior - Fully server-friendly, no gameplay advantages or shaders --- ## Why Hydron? Underwater exploration shouldn’t feel like looking through fogged glass. Hydron makes oceans, rivers, and flooded caves easier to navigate while keeping water natural and immersive. Lightweight, subtle, and designed to feel native to vanilla Minecraft. --- ## Compatibility with 26.2 Snapshots Hydron has been thoroughly tested and is **fully guaranteed** to work across **all** 26.2 Snapshots and Pre-Releases > ⚠️ **Note:** The 26.2 Snapshot versions can only be downloaded through **[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hydron)** --- ## Overview ### Screenshots (Above water) | Hydron | Vanilla | |----------------------------------|----------------------------------| | | | | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c4790abec144f2605c9c2be81dc3d16bb8c132b.jpeg) | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c416f3b214ffa8409ea44f014b1df4570909e6d1.jpeg) | ### Screenshots (Underwater) | Hydron | Vanilla | |----------------------------------|----------------------------------| | | | | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71e272deb40b42d601c75687495bfc239e9e7f05.jpeg) | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5146fe414b627474de34980b20496b3f67bbd1a.jpeg) | > For a brighter and clearer underwater experience, Hydron can optionally be paired with [**Photon**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/photon-fullbright) --- ## Technical ### Installation 1. Download the ZIP file 2. Place it in your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder 3. Enable it from the Resource Pack menu --- ### Compatibility - Works with all vanilla-based gameplay - Compatible with everything as long as Hydron is above every other pack - Resource pack only, no mods required --- ### Contact For any concerns regarding Hydron, contact me at: precisionzero.creator@gmail.com --- ### License All Rights Reserved
